pr.title: Non-record: 11L mixed int5/int6 + working QAT + TTT (val_bpb=1.1466)

output.summary: Fixes QAT compilation, uses mixed int5/int6 quant with pruning, then adds test-time training plus memory tokens, BigramHash, per-head temps, and a backout.
techniques: Working QAT + mixed int5/int6 quant with magnitude pruning
Post-quant test-time training on validation tokens
BigramHash 10240 with memory tokens, backout connection, and per-head temperatures
